description_long: This lounge set consists of a coordinated arrangement of seating and tables, featuring a three-seater sofa, two single armchairs, a central coffee table, and two side tables. The frames are constructed from wood with a striped pattern of alternating dark and natural wood tones, giving a modern yet warm aesthetic. The seating surfaces and backrests are upholstered in a dark gray fabric, providing a soft and comfortable sitting experience. Each side table is topped with a small, dome-shaped lamp, adding a touch of functionality and ambiance. The coffee table has a light gray top and a lower shelf for additional storage or display. The overall design is geometric and structured, with clean lines and a balanced, symmetrical layout suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or outdoor lounges.
description: A modern lounge set with wood-framed gray-upholstered seating, matching tables, and accent lamps, arranged in a symmetrical, inviting layout.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full set: three-seater sofa at the back, two armchairs on either side, a central coffee table, and two side tables with lamps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa and armchair, as well as the arrangement of the tables and lamps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back design of the sofa and armchairs, with visible wood slats and the coffee table in front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the armchair and sofa side profiles, with clear visibility of the table surfaces and lamp placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat cushions and three back cushions on the sofa, one seat and one back cushion on each armchair; all cushions are attached and rectangular, with no visible loose or corner cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrests with a flat, rectangular profile and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present on all seating pieces; armrests are straight, flat, and extend the full depth of the seat, matching the wood frame.
attribute_leg_style: Short, straight wooden legs integrated into the frame, with a sturdy, block-like appearance and no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
